task: Advanced high-value task: Slo Burn-Rate Window Traceable Calculation Workbook. Scenario: a review committee needs a row-level exception analysis with no inferred or fabricated inputs for slo burn-rate window. Embedded packet: Records: R1 error_count=47 request_count=75 window_minutes=6; R2 error_count=56 request_count=71 window_minutes=9; R3 error_count=42 request_count=86 window_minutes=5. Remediation options: O1 changes error_count by -12% cost=80000; O2 changes request_count by -18% cost=97200; O3 changes window_minutes by -25% cost=56800; max_budget=122400. Rules and constraints: burn_rate=(error_rate)/(1-SLO); page when short and long windows exceed policy; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: create a validation checklist and fill it using the supplied records, citing the exact values behind each pass or failure. Deliver SLO_burn_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
